text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally the day of Curren Chan's debut. She
should be nervous, but she seems completely
fine, uploading selfies to social media.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But with seemingly more than enough motivation
for the race, Curren Chan takes her first step
toward mastering cuteness!
